tools.description: Runs multiple Google Analytics reports in a single Data API batch request.

dimension_filter.description: GA FilterExpression. Accepts an object, JSON-object string, or `field==value` shorthand.

max_cell_chars.description: Optional string clipping limit applied to response cell values.

max_rows.description: Optional response row cap for Contract V1 tabular payloads.

metric_filter.description: GA FilterExpression. Accepts an object or JSON-object string.

output_mode.description: Tabular output shape for the response payload.

summary_only.description: If true, omit row payload and return metadata only.

tools.name: batch_run_reports

tools.description: Preflights report dimensions/metrics via GA checkCompatibility and returns compatibility reason codes plus custom dimension/metric inventory.

dimensions.description: Requested dimensions for preflight compatibility checks.

metrics.description: Requested metrics for preflight compatibility checks.

property_id.description: The Google Analytics property id as integer or "properties/<id>".

tools.name: check_report_compatibility

tools.description: Return copyable Google Analytics auth login commands, including direct browser OAuth when a client id file is supplied.

account.description: Optional Google account hint for browser login.

callback_port.description: Optional fixed loopback callback port for direct browser OAuth.

client_id_file.description: Optional Google OAuth client id file for direct browser OAuth.

headless.description: Include the headless browser flag for SSH or remote environments.

quota_project.description: Optional quota project to include as a follow-up command.

shared_adc.description: Use the conventional shared gcloud ADC file instead of the server-specific file.

tools.name: ga4_auth_login_command

tools.description: Explain configured Google Analytics auth source and optionally verify Google API access without returning secrets.

verify_token.description: When true, verify the active GA4 credential path by calling account summaries. In request_header mode, the caller must send the configured upstream token header. The token is never returned.

tools.name: ga4_auth_status

tools.description: Return the recommended GA4 first-run auth flow, credential modes, and safe starter tools.
tools.name: ga4_get_started

tools.description: Builds landing URL parameter shift diagnostics (pre vs post windows) with channel/source splits.

channel_column.description: Optional channel column; when unset, all rows are grouped under `all`.

max_rows.description: Optional response row cap for Contract V1 tabular payloads.

output_mode.description: Tabular output shape for the response payload.

post_days.description: Number of post-release days after transition window (default: 7).

source_medium_column.description: Optional source/medium column; when unset, all rows are grouped under `all`.

summary_only.description: If true, omit row payload and return metadata only.

top_n.description: Maximum number of ranked parameter shifts to return (default: 100).
